question: What is LeBron James's height?
gold: SELECT height FROM common_player_info WHERE display_first_last = 'LeBron James';
pred: SELECT height FROM common_player_info WHERE player_slug = "LeBron James"

question: How many players are currently active?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM player WHERE is_active = 1;

question: How many home games did the Lakers play in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE team_name_home = 'Los Angeles Lakers' AND season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season';
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home WHERE T2.team_abbreviation_home = "Lakers" AND T1.season_type = "regular"

question: Which team had the highest average home points per game in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, AVG(pts_home) AS avg_pts FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home ORDER BY avg_pts DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT T2.team_name_home FROM game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home JOIN season AS T3 ON T1.season_id = T3.season_id WHERE T1.game_date = "2022-23" GROUP BY T2.team_name_home ORDER BY avg(pts_home) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which teams had a home win rate above 70% in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, SUM(CASE WHEN wl_home = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS win_rate FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home HAVING win_rate > 0.7;
pred: SELECT T2.team_name_home FROM game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home WHERE T1.season_type = "regular" AND T1.wl_home > 70

question: Find active players who were the number one overall pick in the draft.
gold: SELECT c.display_first_last FROM common_player_info c JOIN draft_history d ON c.person_id = CAST(d.person_id AS TEXT) WHERE d.overall_pick = '1' AND c.rosterstatus = 'Active';
pred: SELECT T1.player_name FROM draft_history AS T1 JOIN person_id AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.overall_pick = 1

question: Which team had the highest 3-point shooting percentage at home across all playoff games?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, AVG(fg3_pct_home) AS avg_3p FROM game WHERE season_type = 'Playoffs' AND fg3_pct_home IS NOT NULL GROUP BY team_name_home ORDER BY avg_3p DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT team_name_home FROM game ORDER BY fg3_pct_home DESC LIMIT 3

question: What different types of games are recorded in the NBA?
gold: SELECT DISTINCT season_type FROM game ORDER BY season_type;
pred: SELECT DISTINCT season_type FROM game WHERE team_id_home = "NBA"

question: What arena do the Los Angeles Lakers play in?
gold: SELECT arena FROM team_details WHERE abbreviation = 'LAL';
pred: SELECT arena FROM team_details WHERE city = "Los Angeles"

question: Which team had the most total home losses in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, COUNT(*) AS losses FROM game WHERE wl_home = 'L' AND season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home ORDER BY losses DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT T2.team_name_home FROM game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home JOIN season AS T3 ON T1.season_id = T3.season_id WHERE T1.game_date = "2022-23" GROUP BY T2.team_name_home ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
